title: limonium asperrimum
intro: Limonium asperrimum, also known as the Rough Sea Lavender, is a flowering plant species in the family Plumbaginaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Limonium asperrimum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Limonium asperrimum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support skin health and treat various ailments, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on individual circumstances.
